changelog:
/review:retro now runs a code-review pass over the epic commits as its first step (risk-routed, mirrors /sweep Phase 1->2); findings land in a new Code Review Findings section and are woven into the retro's What Didn't Go Well and System Improvements. New --skip-review flag opts out (used by /sweep, whose Phase 1 already reviews). /review:code-review stays standalone.

--- v4.80 ---
Core test-coverage epic + sweep template hardening. Restored `npm run test:coverage` to exit 0 after the vitest 2→4 bump tightened v8 coverage (61.99→72.12% lines via +254 in-process tests; the bar stayed at 70/70/60/70 — closed by writing tests, not lowering it). commit.js was refactored behavior-preservingly so its 0%-subprocess-only coverage became in-process testable (extract parseArgs/readMessage/appendCoAuthor/runScan/main + `require.main===module` guard + exports; the existing execFileSync subprocess test kept as the behavior guard; 0→91%). epic-overlap.js / doc-drift.js / memory-eval.js got exports-only additions to expose helpers for testing.

SWEEP FIXES (from the epic retro). qa-engineer skill + the /run-todo dev-dispatch prompt (new R6b) now ban count/value test assertions that use `toContain` (substring presence) alone — assert the labelled value instead (`toContain('Concept articles:  1')`, not `toContain('1')`). This false-green recurred once per wave and was caught only in review; the fix moves it to write-time. /todo research step 4b now verifies module paths via `find` before recording them (catches the core/ vs _lib/ layout drift that cost dispatched agents rediscovery rounds). commit.js dry-run ordering is now commented (the .commit-msg write before the dry-run bail is intentional).

NOTE: the +254 new tests do NOT propagate to adopters (template-updater skips __tests__/); the template-facing changes in this release are the qa-engineer skill, the /run-todo + /todo command edits, and the commit.js / _lib exports.

--- v4.79 ---
Pipeline-improvements epic (10 stories) + two pre-release command fixes. Eight toolkit gaps surfaced by running /create:new-project end-to-end on a real greenfield project, plus two ADR follow-ons and two fixes from the epic retro.

PIPELINE & DOCTRINE. S-PI.1 settled the planning-doc lifecycle in an ADR: _feature-ideas.md = idea INBOX (raw capture, never archived), _backlog.md = PLAN OF RECORD (prioritized epics/stories), master/TODO_* = GENERATED PROJECTION of state from backlog + git. S-PI.2 chained /create:project-todo into /create:new-project so the complex tier ends with a master TODO_{Project}.md tracker, not just a backlog. S-PI.9 made that tracker a real generated projection — work commands (/do, /run-todo, /end) regenerate it from checkbox state at close via status.js --regen-master. S-PI.10 generates a lean, project-specific root CLAUDE.md from the planning docs + the specialized stack's real build/test commands (closing the greenfield-vs-onboard asymmetry).

TELEMETRY & INSTRUMENTATION. S-PI.4 fixed the agent-dispatch telemetry blind spot (the Task matcher reported zero dispatches). S-PI.5 added feedback-digest gate-run + scanner-block lines; 6209bad closed its producer gap — secret-scanner.cjs now emits a source-tagged guardrail event on every block, so the digest's scanner-block count is live (and guardrail-stats correctly excludes scanner-sourced events). S-PI.7 added a per-run change-attribution ledger so the lead agent can never misattribute an untracked diff.

COMMIT & DOC HYGIENE. S-PI.3 allowlisted placeholder connection strings in the secret scanner (the highest-frequency false-positive friction). S-PI.6 added stripTemplateMarker so filled templates lose the @@template first-line marker. S-PI.8 added inline commit.js -m support.

RETRO FIXES (this release). /run-todo Path B dev agents now verify only their narrow test file (npx vitest run <file>), never the full gate.js test — N agents gating in one shared working tree caused transient lock-contention + git-fixture flakes; the orchestrator's post-wave gate is the authoritative instrument (new Rule 6a). /triage now drains _feature-ideas.md (ADR decision #2) alongside /listen intake — folds un-drained idea bullets in as origin:feature-ideas, annotates drained ideas in place (the inbox is never archived), adds --ideas-only, and relaxes the no-intake hard-stop.
